title: Combee MC Remodel (Cobblemon)
description: Makes the Combee line look like a Minecraft bee!
body:
## Cobblemon's Official Combee Minecraft Remodel

Makes the Combee line look like a Minecraft Bee. That's it.

![Combee Bees](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/BlIiMzsQ/images/2f37f7d426f61fdaede596915f2113008b48cf59.png)

![Vespiquen Bee](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/BlIiMzsQ/images/f3316b03b6ef1c2944a08e8bbe8b16e28630d732.png)
